A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent incorrectly filtered opportunities by Opportunity.CloseDate in April 2023 (e.g., var_function-call-12950172391771703426) instead of using Contract.CompanySignedDate per the Sales Cycle Policy, thereby excluding the correct agent found via the April-signed contract (var_function-call-10457839706119663190) and computing averages on the wrong set, leading to the wrong returned Id.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s execute_python step (var_function-call-16910049455069302601) filtered opportunities by CreatedDate in April 2023 instead of selecting opportunities that CLOSED in April 2023 (i.e., with Contract.CompanySignedDate in April), leading to an average over the wrong cohort and returning 005Wt000003NJgAIAW rather than the correct 005Wt000003NDEBIA4 (which it even retrieved for the April-signed contract in var_function-call-7686592383258393273 but did not use).

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent filtered opportunities by CreatedDate in April 2023 (query_db on Opportunity) rather than selecting opportunities that closed (CompanySignedDate) in April 2023, then merged only those with ContractID__c, causing it to exclude relevant April-closed deals (e.g., contracts like 800Wt00000DE9FGIA1 with 2023-04-15) and return 005Wt000003NJgAIAW instead of the ground-truth 005Wt000003NDEBIA4.
